'''sangodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fog|fog]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fog|fog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sangodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sængedheth|sængedheth]] || [[word:sængedhej|sængedhej]] || [[word:sængedhesh|sængedhesh]] || [[word:sængedhe|sængedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sangongodhoth|sangongodhoth]] || [[word:sangongodhoj|sangongodhoj]] || [[word:sangongodhosh|sangongodhosh]] || [[word:sangongodho|sangongodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sangodhoth|sangodhoth]] || [[word:sangodhoj|sangodhoj]] || [[word:sangodhosh|sangodhosh]] || [[word:sangodho|sangodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sangofdhoth|sangofdhoth]] || [[word:sangofdhoj|sangofdhoj]] || [[word:sangofdhosh|sangofdhosh]] || [[word:sangofdhof|sangofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sangodhotho|sangodhotho]] || [[word:sangodhojo|sangodhojo]] || [[word:sangodhosho|sangodhosho]] || [[word:sangodhoko|sangodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sangodhoth|sangodhoth]] || [[word:sangodhoj|sangodhoj]] || [[word:sangodhosh|sangodhosh]] || [[word:sangodho|sangodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sangodhothol|sangodhothol]] || [[word:sangodhojol|sangodhojol]] || [[word:sangodhoshol|sangodhoshol]] || [[word:sangodhokol|sangodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sangodhothotho|sangodhothotho]] || [[word:sangodhojojo|sangodhojojo]] || [[word:sangodhoshosho|sangodhoshosho]] || [[word:sangodhoko|sangodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sangodhothon|sangodhothon]] || [[word:sangodhojon|sangodhojon]] || [[word:sangodhoshon|sangodhoshon]] || [[word:sangodhokon|sangodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sangodhothoro|sangodhothoro]] || [[word:sangodhojoro|sangodhojoro]] || [[word:sangodhoshoro|sangodhoshoro]] || [[word:sangodhokoro|sangodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
